title: The SIDH Attack: Cryptographic Breakthrough of 2022
description: Understand the devastating Castryck-Decru attack that broke SIDH in polynomial time. Learn how auxiliary torsion points enabled key recovery.
learningObjectives: Explain why the SIDH attack was possible
Understand the role of auxiliary torsion points in the attack
Describe the mathematical techniques used (Kani's theorem)
Appreciate the impact on the cryptographic community
Learn lessons for future cryptographic design
